class.name: hdf5
class.description: rosbag2 storage plugin that records directly into an analysis-ready HDF5 file (the same layout as `unbag --format hdf5`): one group per topic, one dataset per flattened column, and a stacked (N,H,W,C) dataset per image topic. Write-only -- the analysis-ready layout is not round-trippable, so playback/reading is not supported.
